parse.why: For PM2 (Poly(pentafluorophenylmethacrylate)), the paper states a typical radical polymerization: 5.0 g monomer (M2), 25 g dry benzene, and 32.5 mg AIBN were deoxygenated (freeze–thaw 3×), the sealed flask was heated at 80 °C for 6 h. After reaction, solvent was mostly removed, polymer was precipitated in methanol, redissolved in benzene, reprecipitated in methanol, centrifuged, and finally dried in a vacuum oven at 40 °C. Relevant extraction: temperature 80 °C, time 6 h (0.25 day), and a post-treatment drying step at 40 °C.

synthesis.gel_composition: POSS + PFPE + LiTFSI dissolved in THF; wPOSS=0.12; wLiTFSI=0.30

parse.why: Thermally crosslinked electrolytes (XL-POSSwPOSS-PFPE_wLiTFSI) were prepared by dissolving POSS, PFPE, and LiTFSI in THF, stirring 1 h at room temperature then 3 h at 70°C; the solution was cast and dried at 60°C for 3 days; films were annealed under vacuum at 120°C for 48 h to crosslink. The sample label XL-POSS0.12-PFPE_0.30 corresponds to wPOSS=0.12 and wLiTFSI=0.30.

parse.why: Section 2.1 states: "As a contrast, the same synthetic procedure was adopted for PETMP-EMA-PEGDA (PEP)" as used for PFP. That procedure includes base-catalyzed thiol-Michael addition (TEA) in DMF at room temperature (12 h), followed by addition of PEGDA in DMF (further 24 h), then precipitation into cold diethyl ether, filtering with cold diethyl ether three times, washing with n-hexane, and drying in a vacuum oven at 80 °C for 24 h. Only the post-reaction handling steps map to the schema as post_treatment_steps.

parse.why: Section 2.2: “0.015 mol of EMPEP and 0.026 mol of HDI were reacted in a flask under a nitrogen atmosphere at 85 °C for 3 h. Then, 0.01 mol PEG800 together with 3 drops of T9 and T12 were added … to continue reacting for 1.5 h… DMF was used to adjust the viscosity… Finally, … cure at 110 °C for 8 h.” These steps define the FR-PU synthesis and post-curing.

synthesis.gel_composition: 0.015 mol BDO : 0.026 mol HDI : 0.01 mol PEG800; catalysts: T9 and T12 (3 drops each); solvent: DMF

parse.why: Text states: "For comparison, BDO was adopted to replace EMPEP to prepare non-flame retardant polyurethane (Pure PU) with the same process." The FR-PU process (applied identically to Pure PU) specifies: 0.015 mol EMPEP and 0.026 mol HDI reacted at 85 °C for 3 h under N2; then 0.01 mol PEG800 with 3 drops each of T9 and T12 for 1.5 h; DMF used to adjust viscosity; finally cure at 110 °C for 8 h in a PTFE mold. Therefore, for Pure PU, EMPEP is replaced by BDO with the same amounts and steps; curing at 110 °C for 8 h is captured as a post-treatment token.

parse.why: FR-PU solid electrolytes were prepared by dissolving FR-PU and LiTFSI in DMF, pouring into a PTFE mold at 110°C, and curing 8 h; mass ratios FR-PU:LiTFSI were 95:5, 90:10, 85:15, 80:20, 75:25 (FR-PU-10% Li corresponds to 90:10). synthesis.gel_composition: PVdF-HFP:PBMA = 70:30 wt%; polymers 16 wt% in acetone:DMF = 3:7; LLZTO-free

parse.why: ESM is defined as the LLZTO-free PVdF-HFP/PBMA electrospun membrane. parse.why: 与 MFSM_2 直接相关的合成信息来自 2.2.2 段：MFSM_2 由两步法合成：先将二甲基氯硅烷(15.4 g, 0.16 mol)缓慢加入含氯铂酸(0.1 g, 0.19 mmol)与 AOEM_2(25.1 g, 0.15 mol)的混合物中，在冰盐浴、氩气保护下于 70°C 反应 24 h，经减压蒸馏(b.p. 122°C/3 mmHg)得到氯代中间体(产率 75%)；随后将该中间体(28.7 g, 0.11 mol)缓慢加入含 KF(7.0 g, 0.12 mol)与无水乙腈(80 mL)的混合物中，于 70°C 反应 10 h，经减压蒸馏(b.p. 105°C/3 mmHg)得到 MFSM_2(产率 81%)。另据 2.3 段，所有合成的氟代硅烷化合物在使用前均经 4Å 分子筛干燥，水含量 <20 ppm。上述为合成相关信息；不存在沸石晶化、模板、凝胶配比等信息，故相应字段置为 null。

parse.why: FBCP_20 is a PFMA-b-PEO-b-PFMA triblock copolymer prepared by ATRP of FMA from a PEO macroinitiator (Sec. 2.3). After ATRP (overnight at 100 °C in cyclohexanone under N2 with CuBr/PMDETA), the mixture was diluted, passed through neutral Al2O3, poured into hexane, and the triblock copolymer was filtered and dried. The PEO macroinitiator synthesis (Sec. 2.2) included washing the organic solution twice with brine and once with deionized water, followed by filtration and drying. Only post-synthesis workup steps that match the allowed tokens are listed.

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor solution: PETEA monomers (3–5 wt%), FG powder (0 wt%), liquid electrolyte (~95 wt%), AIBN 3 mg; ~150 μL precursor introduced into PVDF-HFP nanofiber membrane

parse.why: Section 2.1: "The FG-GPE was synthesized by in situ polymerization of the precursor solution. The precursor solution was made from certain amounts of PETEA monomers (3–5 wt%), FG powder, liquid electrolyte (approximately 95 wt%), and 3 mg AIBN. After magnetically stirring for 3 h... approximately 150 μL of precursor solution was introduced into a PVDF-HFP nanofiber membrane. By heating the batteries at 60 °C for 12 h, the monomers were completely transformed into a polymer. The membrane was labelled as FG-GPE." The samples included 0 wt%, 0.3 wt%, 0.5 wt%, and 0.7 wt% FG, named FG-GPE-0, FG-GPE-3, FG-GPE-5, FG-GPE-7; thus FG-GPE-0 has 0 wt% FG.

synthesis.gel_composition: PETEA monomers (3–5 wt%), FG (0.3 wt%), liquid electrolyte (~95 wt%), AIBN (3 mg)

parse.why: 文本给出：'The FG-GPE was synthesized by in situ polymerization of the precursor solution. The precursor solution was made from certain amounts of PETEA monomers (3-5 wt%), FG powder, liquid electrolyte (approximately 95 wt%), and 3 mg AIBN.'；样品命名：'...0 wt%, 0.3 wt%, 0.5 wt%, and 0.7 wt%... named as FG-GPE-0, FG-GPE-3, FG-GPE-5, and FG-GPE-7.' 故FG-GPE-3对应FG=0.3 wt%。工艺条件：搅拌3 h；装配时向PVDF-HFP纳米纤维膜注入约150 μL前驱体并在60°C加热12 h完成原位聚合（适用于所有FG-GPE样品）。由于schema限制，聚合加热未写入post_treatment_steps，仅在说明中保留。

synthesis.gel_composition: PETEA monomers (3–5 wt%), FG powder (0.5 wt% for FG-GPE-5), liquid electrolyte (~95 wt%), AIBN (3 mg)

parse.why: FG-GPE was prepared by in situ polymerization of a precursor containing PETEA monomers (3–5 wt%), FG powder, liquid electrolyte (~95 wt%), and 3 mg AIBN; precursor was stirred 3 h. Samples with different FG wt% were made: 0, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7 wt%, named FG-GPE-0/3/5/7, so FG-GPE-5 corresponds to 0.5 wt% FG. Approximately 150 μL precursor was introduced into a PVDF-HFP nanofiber membrane and heated at 60°C for 12 h to complete polymerization.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF/TBAC/MWCNT solution (electrospinning); in-situ growth of MnO2 nanosheets via reaction of KMnO4 (acidic) with MWCNTs on PVDF/TBAC/MWCNT TLNM

synthesis.gel_composition: acetone:PDDATFSI = 9:1 (w/w); water:PDDATFSI = 1.5:1 (w/w)

parse.why: 制膜采用相转化法：PDDATFSI加入由丙酮(溶剂)与去离子水(非溶剂)组成的混合物中，连续搅拌6 h；丙酮:PDDATFSI质量比9:1，水:PDDATFSI质量比1.5:1；将溶液浇注于PTFE板并在室温老化6 h以蒸发丙酮，随后在60°C真空干燥24 h以去除剩余水分。引用："The PDDATFSI porous membrane was prepared via a phase inversion method... The weight ratio of acetone to PDDATFSI was set as 9:1 meanwhile the weight ratio of water to PDDATFSI was set as 1.5:1... aged at room temperature for 6 h... followed by a vacuum drying at 60°C for 24 h"。仅能标准化记录的后处理步骤为干燥60°C 24 h。

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor: 12 wt% C1-4TFSI + 0.1 wt% AIBN in Li-EMITFSI-based electrolyte (0.5 M LiTFSI in EMITFSI with 10 wt% FEC)

parse.why:
与 Li-HPILSE 直接相关的制备信息：
- 前驱体配方（反应前）：“The precursor was composed of 12 wt% C1-4TFSI and 0.1 wt% AIBN initiator dissolved in Li-EMITFSI-based electrolyte.”；Li-EMITFSI 组成：“0.5 M LiTFSI … with 10 wt% FEC”。
- 组装与聚合条件：前驱体注入 PDDATFSI 多孔膜后，“heated at 60 °C for 12 h to enable the C1-4TFSI monomer fully polymerized … and therefore obtain a transparent HPILSE film.”；文中亦说明 Li 与 Na 两种，目标样品为含 LiTFSI 的 Li-HPILSE。

synthesis.gel_composition: DSLE4: 1.2 M LiTFSI/LiDFOB in FEC (LiTFSI:LiDFOB = 8:4) + TFEMA + PETA (1 vol.%) + azobisisobutyronitrile; total polymer (TFEMA+PETA) content = 5 vol.% (relative to total AFPE).

parse.why: AFPEs were prepared by dissolving TFEMA, PETA (fixed at 1 vol.%), and azobisisobutyronitrile into DSLE, then heating at 80 °C for 12 h. AFPEs with 5, 10, and 20 vol.% of polymer are indicated as AFPE5, AFPE10, and AFPE20. DSLE4 used here is defined as 1.2 M total LiTFSI/LiDFOB in FEC with LiTFSI:LiDFOB = 8:4. In coin-cell assembly, the precursor was left standing 2 h then polymerized at 80 °C for 12 h. These procedures apply to all AFPEs, thus to AFPE5.

synthesis.gel_composition: DSLE4 precursor: 1.2 M LiTFSI/LiDFOB in FEC with LiTFSI:LiDFOB = 8:4; TFEMA + PETA (1 vol%) + azobisisobutyronitrile dissolved in DSLE; polymer content (TFEMA+PETA) = 10 vol.% of AFPE.

parse.why: AFPEs were prepared by dissolving TFEMA, PETA (fixed at 1 vol%), and azobisisobutyronitrile into DSLE, then heating at 80 °C for 12 h; AFPE10 denotes 10 vol.% polymer (TFEMA+PETA). DSLE4 is 1.2 M LiTFSI/LiDFOB in FEC with LiTFSI:LiDFOB = 8:4.

syn_extract_result.error: Error code: 502

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor solution composed of lithium salts LiTFSI (0.68 mol L^-1) and LiDFOB (0.68 mol L^-1), solvent FEC, monomer DOL, and four-armed cross-linker PEE; in situ cationic ring-opening crosslinking of PEE and DOL initiated by BF3 (generated from LiDFOB via LiBF4) under heating inside the assembled cell. Optimized sample (c-GPE-50) uses 50 mol% PEE with 91 wt% FEC solvent uptake.

parse.why: The paper states the precursor solution was composed of LiTFSI and LiDFOB salts, FEC solvent, DOL monomer, and four-armed cross-linker PEE, injected into the assembled battery, followed by in situ crosslinking initiated by BF3 derived from LiDFOB under heating (Section 2.1, Fig. 1a). The salt concentrations were fixed at 0.68 mol L^-1 for both LiDFOB and LiTFSI (Section 2.2). The optimized composition used 50 mol% PEE and achieved 91 wt% solvent uptake (denoted c-GPE-50) (Section 2.2, Fig. 1b). No explicit polymerization temperature, time, or agitation rate was provided.

synthesis.gel_composition: 6FBPA (1.00 g, 3.0 mmol) + pentafluorophenyl sulfide (1.16 g, 1.12 equiv) + K2CO3 (0.49 g, 1.50 equiv) in DMAc (10 mL) + benzene (10 mL); after dehydration/remove benzene add 3-ethynylphenol (0.12 g, 4.00 equiv) + benzene (10 mL)

parse.why: E-FPAESI was synthesized by step growth polymerization: "6FBPA (1.00 g, 3.0 mmol) and pentafluorophenyl sulfide (1.16 g, 1.12 equiv) were dissolved in DMAc (10 mL)... K2CO3 (0.49 g, 1.50 equiv) was added followed by benzene (10 mL)... heated to 120 °C... maintained for 2 h... After removing benzene, the reaction mixture was stirred at this temperature for a further period 2 h. To attach an ethynyl group... 3-ethynylphenol ... and benzene (10 mL) were added... reaction was continued for 2 h." Workup: "precipitated into 400 mL of methanol/water (1:1)... reprecipitated into methanol. The precipitated polymer was filtered and washed with methanol. The white solid was dried under vacuum (60 °C) for 3 days."

synthesis.gel_composition: DES: TML:LiTFSI = 5:1 (molar); precursor solution HFBA:DES = 1:3 (volume); copolymerization of HFBA with MBA (chemical crosslinker) and UPy-containing monomer; in-situ thermal polymerization at 60°C for 4 h.

parse.why: FPDE prepared by in-situ polymerization of hexafluorobutyl acrylate (HFBA), MBA and a UPy-containing monomer in a DES formed by TML and LiTFSI. Evidence: “The deep eutectic solvent was formed by tetramethyl urea (TML) and lithium salt (LiTFSI). N,N′-Methylene methacryloyl (MBA) as the chemical crosslinking agent and UPy as physical crosslinking group… copolymerization reaction of hexafluorobutyl acrylate monomer (HFBA), MBA and UPy containing monomer (Fig. 1a).” Optimization set: “the TML: LiTFSI molar ratio of DES electrolyte was set to 5:1.” Precursor ratios and curing: “several HFBA and DES based precursor solutions with different volume ratios (1:1 to 1:5)… After 4 h thermal polymerization at 60 °C… Considering the curing effect and ionic conductivity, the volume ratio of HFBA … to DES is fixed at 1:3 in subsequent research.”

No template or inorganic sources are used; no crystallization conditions apply.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF 15 wt% in DMSO/NMP (1:1 v/v); dissolved at 80 °C for 24 h; doctor blade cast; VIPS exposure to wet air (RH) for 10 min before subsequent steps

parse.why: PVDF (VIPS) membranes were made by dissolving PVDF (15 wt%) in DMSO/NMP (1:1 v/v) at 80 °C for 24 h, casting on glass via doctor blade, and for VIPS immediately exposing the cast film to wet air (specific RH) for 10 min. Membranes were then air-dried 5 h, immersed in distilled water for 24 h to remove solvent, and finally dried at 80 °C under vacuum for 24 h. Prior to solution preparation, PVDF was dried at 60 °C under vacuum for 24 h. Source lines: “The dope solutions were manufactured by dissolving PVDF … in DMSO/NMP (v/v = 1:1) … at 80 °C for 24 h … (15 wt%). … For the VIPS method, the cast film was immediately exposed to wet air … for 10 min. The obtained membranes were first air-dried … 5 h, and immersed in distilled water for 24 h … After that, all the prepared membranes were dried at 80 °C in a vacuum oven for 24 h.” Also: “The fluorinated polymer (PVDF) … were dried at 60 °C under a vacuum for 24 h …”

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor mixture (ratio per Table S1): 2,2,2-trifluoroethyl acrylate (TFEA) + 2-(2-ethoxyethoxy) ethyl acrylate (EEA) + poly(ethylene glycol) diacrylate (PEGDA, MW~600) + succinonitrile (SN) + LiTFSI; with additional 1 wt% FEC; UV initiator: 2,2-dimethoxy-2-phenylacetophenone (Irgacure 651).

parse.why: PFMC-SPE prepared by in-situ UV-curing after soaking meltblown cloth in a precursor containing TFEA, EEA, PEGDA, SN, and LiTFSI; with additional 1 wt% FEC; Irgacure 651 as UV initiator. Polymerization under UV (1 mW/cm^2 for 10 mins). Text: “the precursor solution containing 2,2,2-trifluoroethyl acrylate (TFEA), 2-(2-ethoxyethoxy) ethyl acrylate (EEA) and poly (ethylene glycol) diacrylate (PEGDA), succinonitrile (SN) and LiTFSI… 1 wt% additional FEC… irgacure 651 was added… polymerization process was conducted by ultraviolet light (1 mW/cm^2 for 10 mins).” Soaking time 2 h reported for infiltration; no synthesis temperature stated.

The paper defines FMC-SPE as the excessively fluorinated meltblown cloth SPE but defers its specific precursor ratios to Table S1, which is not provided: "For excessive fluorinated meltblown cloth SPE (FMC-SPE) and non-fluorinated meltblown cloth SPE (NFMC-SPE), see Table S1." Therefore gel composition and reagents for FMC-SPE cannot be specified. A clearly stated processing step applicable to the meltblown cloth used for all SPEs is: "The obtained square melt blown cloth was dried in an oven at 80 °C for 24 h." UV-curing parameters are explicitly described for PFMC-SPE and not unambiguously stated for FMC-SPE, so they are not recorded.

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor solution composed of MAIL (methacrylate-functionalized pyrrolidinium IL with an ethylene oxide spacer), PFS (pentafluorostyrene), PEGMA, PEGDMA, Li[G4]TFSI, and HMPP (photoinitiator). Li[G4]TFSI prepared as a G4 solution of LiTFSI at 2.8 mol L^-1 at 50 °C. The precursor (0.8 mL) was placed in a PTFE mold (25 mm × 25 mm × 2 mm) and UV-irradiated (λ = 365 nm, 100 W) for 15 min to form the quasi-solid electrolyte membrane.

parse.why: Section 2.1 states Li[G4]TFSI was obtained by preparing a G4 solution of LiTFSI at 2.8 mol L^-1 at 50 °C, then Li[G4]TFSI, monomers (MAIL, PFS, PEGMA, PEGDMA), and HMPP were mixed to form a homogeneous precursor solution; 0.8 mL was introduced into a PTFE mold (25×25×2 mm) and irradiated with a 365 nm, 100 W UV lamp for 15 min to yield a quasi-solid electrolyte membrane. Section 3 reiterates that MAIL, PFS, PEGMA, PEGDMA, Li[G4]TFSI, and HMPP were mixed and UV-cured to form EFA-G. No washing/drying/calcination or other post-treatments were described.

Purification/processing: "collected by precipitation in ethyl ether ... dissolved in THF (1 mL) and centrifuged out with addition of ethyl ether (15 mL) ... repeated for three times. Salt incorporation and final drying: "The P(PEGMA-co-HFBMA) and LiTFSI with the molar ratio of [O]/[Li+] ranging from 5:1 to 40:1 were dissolved in 3 mL dry THF and stirred for 4 h ... The solvent was removed ... and dried under vacuum at 60 °C for 12 h to obtain the dry FB-SPE."

synthesis.gel_composition: PEO + PFPE-polymer + LiTFSI (casting)

parse.why: Text states: "By incorporating the PFPE-polymer and lithium bis(trifluoromethanesulfonyl)imide (LiTFSI) into PEO via casting, the polymer electrolyte (PFPE-SE) is successfully prepared." No ratios, temperatures, or post-treatments were provided.

synthesis.gel_composition: TEGDVE 1 g (4 mmol) + OFDIB 0.56 g (1 mmol) + LiTFSI 0.47 g (1 mmol) dissolved in 3 mL anhydrous acetonitrile; EO/Li = 3:1; TEGDVE:OFDIB = 4:1; Irgacure 819 photoinitiator 3 wt%. Mixture stirred 7 h, then initiator added and stirred 30 min; solution cast and UV polymerized (LED).

parse.why: SPE synthesis details explicitly given: "The SPE was synthesized through a one-step photopolymerization of triethylene glycol divinyl ether (TEGDVE) and octafluoro-1,4-diiodobutane (OFDIB) in the presence of LiTFSI." Formulation: "1 g (4 mmol) of TEGDVE and 0.56 g (1 mmol) of OFDIB were dissolved in 3 mL of anhydrous acetonitrile. Subsequently, 0.47 g (1 mmol) of LiTFSI was added ... and the mixture was stirred for 7 h." Initiator: "3 wt% of Irgacure 819 ... followed by an additional 30 min of stirring." Polymerization: "cast into a Petri dish and exposed to a 365-nm LED for 30 min." Drying: "the polymer electrolyte was dried at 75 °C under vacuum for 24 h." Optimized ratios: "EO units in TEGDVE to LiTFSI (Li) was maintained at 3:1" and "optimal TEGDVE-to-OFDIB molar ratio was determined to be 4:1."

synthesis.gel_composition: TEGDVE + LiTFSI (EO/Li = 3:1) in acetonitrile; Irgacure 819 photoinitiator 3 wt%; solution casting, 365-nm UV for 30 min; prepared under same conditions as sample 9 but without OFDIB

parse.why: Text states: "Poly(TEGDVE)-LiTFSI was synthesized under the same conditions as poly(TEGDVE-OFDIB)-LiTFSI, following the experimental procedure for sample 9 in Table S1, but without the OFDIB component." The referenced procedure details: EO/Li ratio of 3:1; inside Ar glovebox dissolve TEGDVE and LiTFSI in anhydrous acetonitrile, add 3 wt% Irgacure 819, UV 365 nm for 30 min, then dry at 75 °C under vacuum for 24 h. Therefore composition and post-treatment were extracted; other fields not applicable.

synthesis.gel_composition: FC-H (1.0 g) + TMC (3.0 g) dissolved in DMF (16 mL); DPP catalyst (1 mL, 0.03 g, 30 mg mL^-1); N2 purged 30 min; ring-opening polymerization at 130 °C; polymerization time adjusted (12/24/36 h) to tune grafting ratio.

parse.why: The Experimental section states: “In a typical reaction, 1.0 g FC-H and 3.0 g TMC were dissolved in 16 mL DMF... 1 mL DPP (0.03 g, 30 mg mL^-1) was added... After N2 purging for 30 min the reaction vessel was immersed in a metal bath at 130 °C for 12, 24, and 36 h... The reaction mixture was precipitated in ethanol, redissolved in DMF, and reprecipitated two more times. The precipitate was dried at 60 °C under vacuum.” These general synthesis and purification conditions apply to FC-H_{0.1}-T_n, thus to FC-H_{0.1}-T_1. The exact polymerization time for T_1 is not specified; therefore crystallization/time fields are left null and only the drying step is recorded.

synthesis.gel_composition: TB 0.03 M; TFPO/DOL volume ratio 1/9; prepared by mixing TB dissolved in TFPO with DOL containing LiTFSI. Method details: 0.03 mmol TB in 0.1 mL TFPO; 2 mmol LiTFSI in 0.9 mL DOL; in situ copolymerization at room temperature.

parse.why: The paper states the electrolyte is an in situ copolymerized mixture with TB as initiator: '0.03TB-TFPO/9DOL (TB concentration of 0.03 M, TFPO/DOL volume ratio of 1/9)'. Preparation details: 'TB was first dissolved in TFPO ... quickly mixed with a DOL liquid of lithium bis(trifluoromethanesulfonyl)imide (LiTFSI)'. Materials and methods specify amounts: '2 mmol LiTFSI ...; 0.03 mmol TB was dissolved in 0.1 mL TFPO ... to obtain the precursor solution of 0.03TB-TFPO/9DOL ... copolymer electrolytes were prepared after being placed at room temperature for a period of time.' No filtration/calcination etc. are mentioned.

synthesis.gel_composition: FPO:THF = 2/1; BF3·OEt2 0.5 mol%

parse.why: PFT21 is one of five copolyethers prepared by varying the FPO/THF feed ratios (2/1 gives PFT21). The general procedure (shown for PFT11) used BF3·OEt2 (0.5 mol%) to initiate cationic ring-opening copolymerization of FPO and THF at room temperature for 24 h under Ar, followed by dissolving in DCM, precipitating into n-hexane, and vacuum drying at 45 °C to constant weight. Only the composition and the drying step match the schema tokens; other steps are not mappable.

synthesis.gel_composition: [FPO]:[THF] = 1/2

parse.why: General procedure: “FPO and THF (feeding ratio: 1/1) were mixed… 0.5 mol % BF3·OEt2 was added… stirred at room temperature for 24 h. After the reaction, the product was dissolved in DCM and precipitated into n-hexane. The precipitate was collected and dried in a vacuum oven at 45 °C until a constant weight was achieved…”; applicability to all compositions including PFT12: “By varying the FPO/THF feeding ratios (2/1, 3/2, 1/1, 2/3, and 1/2), the copolyethers with five compositions were obtained and designated as PFT21, PFT32, PFT11, PFT23, and PFT12, respectively.” The specific composition for PFT12 is FPO/THF = 1/2. Only the drying step has a concrete condition (45 °C), hence recorded.

synthesis.gel_composition: DOL monomer + LiTFSI + Tris(pentafluorophenyl)boron (TFB) precursor solution injected into ZnO/PVDF-HFP separator; in situ polymerized to PDOL

parse.why: Relevant synthesis details explicitly stated: "A precursor solution consisting of DOL monomer, LiTFSI, and polymerization initiator Tris(pentafluorophenyl)boron (TFB) was injected into the ZnO/PVDF-HFP skeleton. PDOL subsequently forms to filled in the space in the separator skeleton resulting in a composite SPE film." and "The polymerization is considered complete after 12 h, which yields solid PDOL with little to no fluidity." The backbone is described as: "The ZnO/PVDF-HFP separator fabricated by electrospinning... indicating that zinc nitrate hexahydrate (ZNH) is successfully converted to wurtzite ZnO via hydrothermal method." No temperatures/ratios for polymerization or hydrothermal steps are provided; thus other fields are null.

synthesis.gel_composition: 2,2'-Bis(trifluoromethyl)benzidine (Bt, 40 mg) in 0.12 M HCl (20 mL); 2,4,6-triformylphloroglucinol (Tp, 20 mg) in 0.12 M HCl (10 mL); sodium dodecyl benzene sulfonate (SDBS, 10 mg) in trichloromethane (10 mL); surfactant added into ultrapure water, stand 30 min; add solution-1, stand 1 h; add solution-2.

parse.why: F-BtTp-Nfilm was synthesized at a gas–liquid interface: Bt (40 mg) in 0.12 M HCl (20 mL), Tp (20 mg) in 0.12 M HCl (10 mL), and SDBS (10 mg) in trichloromethane (10 mL); surfactant added to ultrapure water, stood 30 min, solution-1 added and stood 1 h, then solution-2 added and stood for 5 days (2.2). The F-BtTp-Nfilm was transferred onto both sides of a PP separator and vacuum-dried to form F-BtTp@PP (2.3). No temperatures were provided for drying; crystallization time was explicitly 5 days; agitation was by standing.

The paper specifies that the blank/benchmark separator is the bare commercial PP: 'In all of the above batteries, Celgard 2500 was used as the elemental separator for modifications. The separator of the blank battery is the bare commercial PP.' No synthesis, formulation, crystallization, or post-treatment steps are reported for bare PP.

The naming and loading are defined: "the obtained double-layer PMIA membranes with different TiO2 contents (0, 2 wt%, 4 wt%, 6 wt%, 8 wt% based on the PMIA solution mass) were referred to P-PMIA, 2T-PMIA, 4T-PMIA, 6T-PMIA and 8T-PMIA, respectively." FTIR confirms PVDF-HFP incorporation: "the spectra of P-PMIA and T-PMIA membranes ... demonstrated that the PVDF-HFP was successfully introduced into PMIA membrane."

parse.why: PEMVH-A is defined as the composite GPE membrane with nano-sized gamma-Al2O3 filler. Preparation: P(VDF-HFP), PMMA, and PEO in a mole ratio of 1:2:2 were dissolved in acetone/DMF/acetonitrile; then 10 wt% gamma-Al2O3 (20 nm) was dispersed by magnetic stirring at 50 °C for 24 h; the solution was cast and the membrane obtained after solvent evaporation at 70 °C under vacuum for 12 h; membranes were then immersed in electrolyte at least 12 h. Relevant excerpts: “in an optimized mole ratio of 1:2:2… 10 wt% … γ-Al2O3 (20 nm)… by magnetic stirring at 50 °C for 24 h… evaporation … at 70 °C under vacuum for 12 h… immersed … at least 12 h… defined as ‘PEMVH-A’.”

parse.why: GPE membranes were prepared by solution casting at room temperature. PVDF-HFP and PMMA were blended at 9:1 wt%; polymer:electrolyte ratio was 3:7 wt%. PVDF-HFP dissolved in acetone and PMMA in THF, each stirred ~6 h, then mixed and stirred 6 h. EC and DEC were combined 1:1 v/v and 0.5 M Na–X added to make the LE; for GPE-1 X=CF3SO3. The LE was mixed with the polymer blend and stirred ~12 h, then the solution was cast and dried at room temperature. (Table I and Experimental sections). Drying temperature not numerically specified, so no post-treatment token recorded.

The polymer PEMA was blended in different wt% (5, 10, 15, 20, 25 and 40).\" Thus the drying steps (303 K, 48 h; 323 K, 5 h) apply to PE-40."

synthesis.gel_composition: PPAL5 polymer film: PVDF-HFP/PEGMEMA = 7/3 (w/w); AMPS = 10 wt% (relative to PVDF-HFP + PEGMEMA); LATP = 5 wt% (relative to total mass of polymer + lithium salt); AIBN = 0.25 wt% (relative to total monomers); IPTS = 0.5 wt% (of LATP); solvent: DMF. PPALx-D precursor applied to PPAL5: 1.0 mM LiDFOB + 1.0 mL DOL + 4.0 mL LBE-201 (1 M LiPF6 in EC/DMC 1:1 w/w); ~40 μL precursor pipetted on both sides of PPAL5 membrane.

Finally, the prepared batteries are left to stand for 12 h.' 其中x=5适用于PPAL5-D。

parse.why: Preparation states: PEO and PVDF-HFP were measured with a mass ratio of 5:5 and dispersed in a mixed solvent (DMF:ACN = 4:1), dissolved at 60°C for 5 h. Kevlar fiber fabric used as reinforcement. The PTFE sheet bearing the slurry was dried at 50°C for 12 h. The composition ratio of PEO, PVDF-HFP, and Kevlar fiber in the final product was about 3:3:4. Finally, the PPK GPE membranes were activated by absorbing organic LE (1 M LiPF6 in EC/DMC/EMC=1:1:1) for 20 min.

parse.why: 与 sPZ 直接相关的合成步骤：先在 1-丁醇/去离子水混合介质中将正丁氧基锆(IV)水解于 60°C 反应 8 h 得到自制纳米 ZrO2；随后加入乙烯基三甲氧基硅烷改性 2 h；再在 80°C、过氧化苯甲酰存在下，将 MMA 单体接枝至纳米 ZrO2 表面进行原位聚合 4 h，得到 PMMA–ZrO2 杂化颗粒；产物在 80°C 真空干燥 24 h 后保存于干燥器中，并命名为 sPZ。可用的标准化后处理仅能记录为“dried_80c_24h”。其他字段（如晶化、配方、模板等）文中未给出或不适用，故置为 null。

parse.why: Hybrid membrane preparation: “P(VDF - HFP) - Lix(6 g) was dissolved in 60 mL anhydrous DMF; then LATP of different quality scores were added and stirred at 60 °C for 12 h… dripped on a glass plate and dried at 60 °C for 2 h… Then, the film was dried at 80 °C in vacuum for 24 h… The hybrid membrane is named P(VDF - HFP) - Lix - YLATP (Y denotes the content of LATP). To improve the electrochemical performance… with the addition of LiTFSI salt (the mass ratio of polymer to LiTFSI was 3:1).” (Section 2.4). Target sample identity and content: “P(VDF-HFP)-Li10-50LATP HSE” and “the P(VDF-HFP)-Li10 and LATP contents of 50 wt% are chosen to prepare HSE” (Results). Polymer precursor processing (component of target sample): “After completing the reaction, the product was precipitated in ether and washed three times with deionized water… dried in vacuum at 80 °C for 24 h. The final product was denoted as P(VDF-HFP)-Lix.” (Section 2.2).

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF:POSS-(PMMA46)8 = 100:5 (mass); 15% in DMF

parse.why:
与该样品直接相关的制备描述：
- “PVDF and the POSS-(PMMA)8 were mixed (100:5 by mass) and dissolved in DMF to obtain a solution of 15% concentration with continuously stirring at 40 °C for over 6 h. Nanocomposite fibrous membranes were prepared by electrospinning method at 35 °C. The essential electrospinning parameters were as follows: the applied voltage is 15.0 kV, the feeding rate is 1.80 ml h−1, and a tip-to-collector distance is 25.0 cm.”（此处POSS-(PMMA)8具体为POSS-(PMMA46)8 对应目标样品）
- “GPEs were prepared by soaking the composite membranes in the electrolyte solution: 1 M LiPF6 in EC/EMC/DEC (1:1:1 by volume).”
据此记录配比为PVDF:POSS-(PMMA46)8=100:5（质量比），溶剂DMF，总浓度15%。电纺参数与浸渍电解液信息作为佐证保留于说明中。

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor mixture: 0.5 g PVA in 50 mL NMP (130 °C, 2 h, stirring) → PVA solution; 0.1 g GO in 10 mL NMP (ultrasonic 30 min) → GO solution. Then mix 1 mL PVA solution + 1 mL GO solution + 5.5 mL NMP + 2.5 g PVDF-HFP; stir 2 h. Cast onto glass with 100 μm doctor blade; immediately immerse in 5 wt% NaBO2 aqueous solution for 24 h (solvent exchange; BO2− cross-links PVA to form borate bonds). Dry in vacuum at 60 °C for 4 h to obtain PHGB polymer electrolyte.

parse.why: Sections 2.1–2.2 specify the PHGB preparation: PVA dissolved in NMP at 130 °C for 2 h; GO dispersed in NMP by ultrasonication 30 min; mix 1 mL PVA sol + 1 mL GO sol + 5.5 mL NMP + 2.5 g PVDF-HFP; cast (100 μm); solidification bath in 5% NaBO2 for 24 h; vacuum dry at 60 °C for 4 h. These steps uniquely define PHGB; controls without NaBO2 correspond to other samples.

parse.why: 文中说明对照样品“PVDF-HFP polymer electrolyte … prepared in a process basically the same as that of the PHGB polymer electrolyte, with the only difference being that the NaBO2 solution was replaced with deionized water.”（2.2节）。PHGB 的后处理为“After the polymer electrolyte solidification bath for 24 h, … drying in a vacuum drying oven for 4 h at 60 °C.” 因对照样品仅更换固化浴为去离子水，故干燥步骤（60 °C，4 h）同样适用，提取为 post_treatment_steps: "dried_60c_4h"。除该步外，配方/前驱体用量及其他步骤对纯 PVDF-HFP 未给出，置为 null。

Precursor details: PVA solution (0.5 g in 50 mL NMP, 130°C 2 h), GO solution (0.1 g in 10 mL NMP, ultrasonication 30 min), then mix 1 mL each + 5.5 mL NMP, add 2.5 g PVDF-HFP, stir 2 h.

parse.why: Section 2.1 describes LLZTO synthesis: stoichiometric LiOH, ZrO2, La2O3, Ta2O5 (with 10 wt% excess LiOH) mixed and milled in isopropanol for 8 h, dried, calcined at 900 °C for 6 h, pressed, then sintered at 1150 °C for 4 h; pellets were ball milled (500 rpm, 12 h) to obtain cubic LLZTO powders. Crystallization is taken as the sintering at 1150 °C for 4 h (0.1667 day). Post-treatment tokenizable step recorded is calcination_900c_6h; milling/pressing are not among allowed tokens.

synthesis.gel_composition: 50[PEO_8-LiTFSI]-40LLZTO-10PVDF + 9% OX

parse.why: Composite electrolyte membranes were prepared by solvent-casting: PVDF dissolved in DMF (10 wt%), then PEO, LiTFSI (EO:Li=8:1) and oxalate were added and stirred 24 h, LLZTO added and stirred 24 h, solution cast into PTFE mold and dried at 80°C for 12 h (Section 2.2). The composition naming scheme defines our sample as 50[PEO8-LiTFSI]-40LLZTO-10PVDF + 9% OX (x=10, y=40, m=9). Reagents (PEO, LiTFSI, PVDF) were pre-dried at 50°C for 24 h before use.

synthesis.gel_composition: Al2O3@NCM:Super P:PVDF = 95:2:3 (in N-methyl pyrrolidone)

parse.why: Section 2.5: "The Al2O3@NCM cathode was prepared by mixing Al2O3@NCM cathode material, Super P, and PVDF in a weight ratio of 95:2:3 in N-methyl pyrrolidone and grinding for 2 h. The above obtained slurry was then coated on Al foil followed by a vacuum drying at 90 °C for 24 h. The obtained cathode was called as the conventional Al2O3@NCM cathode (c-Al2O3@NCM)."

synthesis.gel_composition: Al2O3@NCM:Super P:PVDF = 95:2:3 in N-methyl pyrrolidone; then infiltrated with PEO8-LiTFSI/acetonitrile slurry

parse.why: For the composite cathode framework (f-Al2O3@NCM), the paper states: the Al2O3@NCM cathode was prepared by mixing Al2O3@NCM, Super P, and PVDF in a weight ratio of 95:2:3 in N-methyl pyrrolidone and grinding for 2 h. The slurry was coated on Al foil and vacuum dried at 90 °C for 24 h (conventional c-Al2O3@NCM). Then the obtained c-Al2O3@NCM was infiltrated with homogeneous PEO8-LiTFSI/acetonitrile electrolyte slurries by a drip-coating method and dried at 55 °C for 24 h to form f-Al2O3@NCM.

synthesis.gel_composition: P(VDF-HFP):PMMA:PEO = 2:2:1 (mass); solvents: acetone:DMF:acetonitrile = 3:1:1 (v/v/v); plasticizer: 1.0 mol L^-1 LiPF6 in EC:DMC = 1:1 (v/v)

parse.why: 文中对 PE-PM-PVH 的制备描述：将 P(VDF-HFP)、PMMA、PEO 以质量比 2:2:1 溶解于丙酮/DMF/乙腈=3:1:1 (v/v/v) 的混合溶剂中，50°C 磁搅拌 24 h，溶液在玻璃板上成膜并用刮刀控制厚度；膜在 70°C 真空干燥 12 h 去除溶剂（2.1节）。干燥后的膜在 Ar 手套箱内浸入 1.0 mol L^-1 LiPF6 / EC-DMC (1:1 v/v) 溶液直至吸液饱和得到 GPE（2.1节）。另外，所用聚合物原料预先在 50°C 真空干燥 48 h（2.1节）。

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF-HFP (0.25 g mL^-1) dissolved in DMF/acetone (7:3, v/v)

parse.why: Text states: "The PVDF-HFP fibrous membranes (hereinafter referred to as PH) were prepared by electrospinning. First, the electrospinning solution (0.25 g mL^-1) was prepared by dissolving PVDF-HFP particles in a mixed solvent of N,N-dimethylformamide (DMF) and acetone (7:3, v/v)... The receiver speed was 320 r min^-1, the distance between the needle tip and the receiver was 12 cm, the voltage was 20 kV, and the solution feed rate was 0.9 mL h^-1. The resulting electrospun fiber membrane was about 100 μm in thickness." These are the synthesis conditions for PH; no crystallization or post-treatments specific to PH were reported.

synthesis.gel_composition: NPGDA/VEC=1:1 (w/w); polymer monomers 5 wt% in precursor; AIBN 0.2 wt%; electrolyte EC/DMC/DEC=1:1:1 (v/v) with 1 M LiPF6

parse.why: NVPH was synthesized by in situ copolymerization of NPGDA and VEC in an electrospun PVDF-HFP membrane. The precursor solution was NPGDA, VEC, liquid electrolyte, and AIBN (initiator 0.2 wt%). The liquid electrolyte was EC/DMC/DEC (1:1:1, v/v) with 1 M LiPF6. The NVPH in this paper refers to NPGDA/VEC = 1:1 (w/w) and 5 wt% total polymer monomer in the precursor solution. Polymerization in sealed cells at 65 °C for 6 h after 6 h infiltration/aging.

synthesis.gel_composition: PETEA + HFA + TCGG (1 M LiPF6 in EC:DEC = 1:1 v/v) + AIBN; PETEA:HFA = 3:2 (w/w); precursor injected into PAN nanofiber membrane

parse.why: The precursor solution was made from PETEA and HFA monomers, liquid electrolyte, and small amounts of AIBN; injected into a PAN nanofiber membrane (Section 2.2.3). Liquid electrolyte (TCGG) with LiPF6 (1 M) in EC:DEC = 1:1 (v/v) (Section 2.1). GPEs with weight ratios such as 3:2 and 1:1 were prepared and tested (Section 2.2.3), corresponding to the sample name 3:2. Polymerization evidenced by precursor solutions after heating at 60 °C changing to a white gel (Fig. 1c–f text) and polymerization process monitored at 60 °C (Fig. 2b caption). Final GPE fabricated by placing the cells into an oven for 12 h (Section 2.2.3), giving time = 12 h (0.5 day).

synthesis.gel_composition: Precursor solution: PETEA:HFA = 1:1 + TCGG (1 M LiPF6 in EC:DEC = 1:1 v/v) + small amount of AIBN; injected into PAN nanofiber membrane; in-situ free-radical polymerization.

parse.why: In-situ GPE preparation: “The gel polymer electrolyte was synthesized by in-situ free-radical polymerization of the precursor solution. The precursor solution was made from certain amounts of PETEA and HFA monomers, liquid electrolyte, and small amounts of AIBN… the precursor solution (PETEA-HFA-TCGG) was injected into a PAN nanofiber membrane during assembly. The final PETEA-HFA-TCGG-PAN GPE was fabricated by placing the cells into an oven for 12 h. Herein, we prepared and tested the GPEs with weight ratios such as 3:2 and 1:1.” TCGG composition: “Liquid electrolyte (TCGG) with LiPF6 (1 M) in EC:DEC = 1:1 (v/v).” Heating behavior: “both the precursor solutions after heating at 60 °C change from a transparent and flowable liquid to a white gel” and similar for the 1:1 precursor (Fig. S2). Temperature for the 12 h oven step was not explicitly stated; thus temp_c = null and time_d = 12 h = 0.5 day.

synthesis.gel_composition: 0.8 g PVDF-HFP : 0.2 g PVAc : 5 g NMP : 0.05 g LAGP : 0.5 g LiTFSI

parse.why: Preparation for CPE(PVAc): "0.8 g PVDF-HFP and 0.2 g PVAc were added to 5 g NMP, and stirred... Then 0.05 g LAGP... and 0.5 g LiTFSI were added and stirred at 50 °C for 4 h... coated... transferred to a vacuum drying oven at 60 °C for drying for 12 h." The composite polymer electrolyte containing PVAc is labeled as CPE(PVAc).

synthesis.gel_composition: poly(HFBM-co-SBMA)-3 + EMI-TFSI (25 wt%) + LiTFSI (20 wt%) in methanol

parse.why: SHSPE3 was prepared by dissolving poly(HFBM-co-SBMA)-3, EMI-TFSI (fixed at 25 wt%) and LiTFSI (optimized at 20 wt%) in methanol, stirring, casting into a PTFE mold, evaporating solvent at 40 °C for 12 h, then vacuum drying at 60 °C for 24 h. SHSPE3 denotes the formulation based on poly(HFBM-co-SBMA)-3.

synthesis.gel_composition: 0.1 g PMC-PEGC : 0.9 g PVFH in 5 mL DMF; stirred 6 h at 60 °C; cast into membrane; after drying, immersed in ether-based or carbonate-based electrolyte

parse.why: Section 2.3: "0.1 g of PMC-PEGC was dispersed in 5 mL of DMF, followed by slowly adding 0.9 g PVFH with stirring for 6 h at 60 °C. Then, ... cast on a glass plate ... After thoroughly drying, the PVFH-PMC-PEGC membrane was immersed in an ether-based or carbonate-based electrolyte, forming the PVFH-PMC-PEG gel electrolyte." Also Section 3.2 notes filler percent is 10 wt%, consistent with 0.1 g:0.9 g.

synthesis.gel_composition: SiO2 core (Stöber): TEOS (11 mL) + deionized water (20 mL) + NH3·H2O (25%, 10 mL) + anhydrous ethanol (200 mL); 30 °C, 24 h. Shell polymerization (SiO2@PEGC): MPS-grafted SiO2 (0.1 g) dispersed in ACN (120 mL) with EGDMA (0.3 mL), PEGMA (0.6 mL), MAA (0.3 mL), AIBN (0.024 g); heated to ACN boiling to distill out 60 mL ACN; product dried 60 °C, 24 h (vacuum), then HF etch and water wash to obtain PMC-PEGC.

parse.why: Relevant excerpts: (1) SiO2 core by Stöber: "TEOS (11 mL) was dissolved in a mixture solution of deionized water (20 mL) (NH3·H2O, 25%) 10 mL and anhydrous ethanol (200 mL). Afterward, the mixture solution was heated at 30 °C for 24 h." (2) MPS grafting: "After adding MPS (5 mL), the suspension was stirred at 30 °C for 24 h. The resultant MPS-grafted SiO2 spheres were obtained by centrifugation and water washing." (3) Shell polymerization: "MPS-grafted SiO2 spheres (0.1 g) were dispersed in ACN (120 mL), EGDMA (0.3 mL), PEGMA (0.6 mL), MAA (0.3 mL), and AIBN (0.024 g) in sequence, and then the mixed solution was heated to boiling point to distill out 60 mL of ACN. The core-shell SiO2@PEGC spheres were purified and dried at 60 °C in a vacuum oven for 24 h." (4) Core removal to obtain PMC-PEGC: "The resultant SiO2@PEGC spheres were etched in a HF solution and followed by water washing until neutral pH." These steps are the direct synthesis of PMC-PEGC; no zeolite crystallization, template, or Al source is involved.

parse.why: Section 2.3 states that PVFH was synthesized by the same procedure as PVFH-PMC-PEGC: PVFH was dissolved in DMF, stirred for 6 h at 60 °C, cast on a glass plate and thoroughly dried to form a membrane, then immersed in ether- or carbonate-based electrolyte to obtain the PVFH gel electrolyte. parse.why: Preparation details explicitly state: "1 g of PVDF-HFP was added into 6 g of NMP... 1 g of MPEGA and ETPTA were subsequently added with different proportions... According to the quality ratios of MPEGA/ETPTA, they were numbered as ME91, ME82, and ME73, respectively." After that: "1.6 g of Pyr13TFSI, 0.4 g of LiTFSI, and 0.01 g of the photoinitiator HMPP were added and agitated in a silicone oil bath at 60 °C for 2 h... irradiated under a UV lamp (wavelength: 365 nm) for 10 min, and finally transferred to a vacuum drying oven for 8 h at 65 °C." These general steps apply to ME91 as one of the numbered samples.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF-HFP (0.5 g) dissolved in acetone (5 g); LLZTO at 1% (relative to the mass of PVDF-HFP) added and sonicated; modified GF prepared by immersion. Precursor solution: VEC + PETEA (5% by mass of VEC) with LiTFSI (1 M) and AIBN (0.01 g) as thermal initiator; precursor dropped onto the modified GF and thermally polymerized.

parse.why: CPE-n denotes LLZTO mass% relative to PVDF-HFP; CPE-1 therefore uses LLZTO 1% (Section 2.2: “1%, 3%, and 5% (relative to the mass of PVDF-HFP) of LLZTO…”, and “composite gel polymer electrolytes are labeled as CPE-n”). Preparation: PVDF-HFP (0.5 g) + acetone (5 g); LLZTO added and sonicated; GF immersed, then vacuum dried 12 h at 60°C; precursor: LiTFSI (1 M) in VEC with PETEA (5% by mass of VEC), plus AIBN (0.01 g); precursor dropped on modified GF; in situ thermal polymerization at 70°C for 5 h (Sec. 2.2). Only drying fits allowed post_treatment token, recorded as dried_60c_12h.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF-HFP (0.5 g) dissolved in acetone (5 g); add LLZTO 3 wt% (relative to PVDF-HFP) to form a uniformly dispersed solution; immerse GF (16 mm) to obtain modified GF. Precursor: VEC + PETEA (5 wt% of VEC) + LiTFSI (1 M) + AIBN (0.01 g); stirred 3 h; 100 µL precursor dropped onto modified GF; in situ thermal polymerization after assembly.

parse.why:
样品命名：文中说明“the composite gel polymer electrolytes are labeled as CPE-n, where the n is the mass percentage ratio of LLZTO in the gel polymer electrolyte relative to the mass of PVDF-HFP.” 因此 CPE-3 对应 LLZTO 为 3 wt%（相对 PVDF-HFP）。
关键配方与步骤：
- “0.5 g PVDF-HFP and 5 g acetone were mixed… Subsequently, 1%, 3%, and 5% (relative to the mass of PVDF-HFP) of LLZTO powder were added and sonicated…”
- “a glass fiber membrane (GF) with a diameter of 16 mm was immersed… placed in a 60°C oven for vacuum drying for 12 h” → 对应 dried_60c_12h。
- “add LiTFSI to a mixed solution of VEC and PETEA (5%) by mass of VEC), and prepare a solution with a concentration of 1 M as the precursor solution. The 0.01 g AIBN was dissolved… The precursor solution was stirred for 3 h…”
- “100 µL of the precursor were dropped on the glass fiber membrane… heated in an oven at 70°C for 5 h” → 记录为 calcination_70c_5h_unknown（加热固化/聚合）。

parse.why: Preparation via NIPS: “Weigh 0.5 g of PMS and 0.5 g of PVDF (5/5, w/w)… add 4 mL of DMF and 80 µL of deionized water. Place… at 60 °C and stir for 3 h… Use a 250 µm doctor blade to spread… solidify in a deionized water bath at 80 °C for 5 min. After… drying its surface moisture… place it in a vacuum drying oven at 80 °C for 12 h to obtain the PMS-PVDF-55 porous film… Immerse… in the electrolyte solution… for 12 h to obtain the porous gel electrolyte PMS-PVDF-55 GPE.” Recorded composition and post-treatments (water bath/washed; vacuum drying at 80 °C for 12 h).

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF:LiClO4 = 3:1 (mass ratio) in DMF

parse.why: Section 2.1: PVDF and LiClO4 were added in a proper amount of DMF with the mass ratio of 3:1, stirred at 45°C for 24 h to form slurry. The slurry was scraped onto one side of PP separators (Celgard 2400), followed by drying at 60°C in vacuum for 6 h; then reverse coating and another drying at 60°C in vacuum for 24 h to obtain the sandwich-like PVDF/PP SSPEs membranes.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF:LiClO4 = 3:1 in DMF

parse.why:
配方与前处理依据：
- “PVDF … and lithium perchlorate (LiClO4) was added in a proper amount of DMF … with the mass ratio of 3:1. The resulting mixture was then stirred continuously at 45 °C in a water bath for 24 h to obtain uniform PVDF/LiClO4 slurry.” 说明溶质配比 PVDF:LiClO4 = 3:1，溶剂为 DMF，并在45 °C搅拌24 h制得浆料。

parse.why: Gel electrolytes were prepared by free radical polymerization of methacrylate monomers in LiTFSA/SL. The chosen methacrylate monomer, a cross-linker (EGDMA), and an initiator (AIBN) were dissolved in a LiTFSA/SL electrolyte and polymerized at 80 °C for 12 h. synthesis.gel_composition: 2 mmol LiBFMB + 1.32 mmol TMPT + 0.2 mmol DMPA in PC/EC/FEC (6:3:1, v/v); stirred 30 min; UV–vis exposure 15 min to form cross-linked polymer gel

parse.why: Preparation of LiBFSIE polymer gel electrolyte: “A 2 mL mixture of PC, EC, and FEC with a volume ratio of 6:3:1 was added to a mixture of 2 mmol LiFBMB, 1.32 mmol TMPT, and 0.2 mmol 2,2-dimethoxy-2-phenylacetophenone (DMPA) ... and stirred for 30 min to achieve a clean solution precursor. Then, the solution precursor was placed in the wells of customized Teflon molds and exposed to UV–vis light for 15 min. A freestanding, cross-linked polymer film was obtained.” In situ formation on electrodes used the same precursor and UV exposure (15 min). No separate crystallization or template/silica/aluminum sources are applicable.

synthesis.gel_composition: Typical free-radical copolymerization: PDMS (monomethacrylate-terminated, Mn=10,000) 6.0 mL + POEM (Mn=500) 11 mL + FPM 3.3 mL in ethyl acetate 80 mL; initiator 2,2′-azobisisobutyronitrile (AIBN) 7 mg; POEM:PDMS:FPM mol ratio = 7:2:1; N2 purge; stirred at 60 °C for 12 h; precipitated in hexane.

parse.why: The paper states: “For a typical experiment, 6.0 mL PDMS, 11 mL POEM, and 3.3 mL FPM were added to a flask that contained 80 mL ethyl acetate; the POEM to PDMS to FPM mole ratio was 7:2:1. Subsequently, 7 mg of 2,2′-azobisisobutyronitrile was added… the flask was purged with N2 gas, and the mixture was stirred at 60 °C for 12 h. After the polymerization reaction was completed, the reaction mixture was precipitated in hexane. The obtained precipitate was dried at 60 °C for 24 h under vacuum to yield the P(OEM-DMS-FPM) copolymer.”

synthesis.gel_composition: PTFMA polymer skeleton 35 vol% in LiDFOB-TEP electrolyte

parse.why: Text states FGPE is synthesized by incorporating PTFMA into a LiDFOB-TEP liquid electrolyte and polymerizing in situ: "we synthesize an in situ designed GPE (FGPE) by incorporating ... PTFMA into a lithium difluoro(oxalato)-borate (LiDFOB)-TEP-based liquid electrolyte" and "functional 2,2,2-trifluoroethyl methacrylate (TFMA) monomer is incorporated ... and then in situ thermally initiated as a polymer network." The precursor is thermally polymerized at 60 °C for 12 h: "the liquid precursor can be fully transformed ... after heating at 60 °C for 12 h. This fabrication process relies on the free radical polymerization ... on TFMA/HEMA monomers." The selected composition for FGPE uses a PTFMA skeleton at 35 vol%: "the volumetric fraction of 35% of PTFMA skeleton is selected to apply in FGPE."

synthesis.gel_composition: LiDFOB-TEP-based liquid electrolyte + HEMA monomer (PHEMA polymer skeleton)

parse.why: HGPE is defined as the GPE with the unfluorinated PHEMA polymer skeleton: "GPE with replaced unfluorinated PHEMA polymer skeleton (denoted as HGPE)". The electrolyte matrix is a "LiDFOB-TEP-based liquid electrolyte" into which monomers are incorporated. The formation is via thermal free-radical polymerization applicable to TFMA/HEMA systems: "free radical polymerization of -C=C on TFMA/HEMA monomers" and the precursor is converted by heating at "60 °C for 12 h". Thus, HGPE is prepared by incorporating HEMA into LiDFOB-TEP and in situ polymerizing at 60 °C for 12 h. No quantitative composition ratios for HGPE are provided.

parse.why: Preparation of PZI-F: "PZI-F was prepared via in-situ polymerization of VIPS, HFMA and PEGDA (1:2:2 by weight) monomers in the electrolyte of 1 M LiTFSI and 1 M LiTPF6 in EC: DMC (3:7 by volume) with 5 wt% FEC additive, 0.2 wt% AIBN as initiator... polymerized in situ at 55 °C for 6 h. parse.why: PZI was prepared by the same synthetic method as PZI-F but without HFMA: “Preparation of PZI, PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6: The same synthetic method was used to prepare PZI… The monomers of PZI were VIPS and PEGDA in the weight ratio of 1: 2.” For PZI and PZI-F, both LiTFSI and LiPF6 were used: “The systems of PZI and PZI-F contain both LiTFSI and LiPF6 lithium salts…”. The in-situ polymerization conditions are given with concentrations and additives (applied to the same method): “PZI-F was prepared via in-situ polymerization… in the electrolyte of 1 M LiTFSI and 1 M LiTPF6 in EC:DMC (3:7 by volume) with 5 wt% FEC additive, 0.2 wt% AIBN as initiator… polymerized in situ at 55°C for 6 h. The content of monomers in the electrolyte was 40%.” These conditions are taken as the synthesis conditions for PZI by the “same synthetic method”. No zeolite template/silica/aluminium sources apply.

synthesis.gel_composition: VIPS:PEGDA = 1:2 (weight); only LiTFSI as lithium salt (single-salt system); EC:DMC = 3:7 (v/v) with 5 wt% FEC; monomer content 40% in electrolyte; AIBN 0.2 wt% (initiator).

parse.why: PZI-LiTFSI was prepared by the same in-situ polymerization method as PZI-F, but containing only LiTFSI: “Preparation of PZI, PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6: The same synthetic method was used… PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6 contained only one corresponding lithium salt, respectively.” PZI monomers and ratio: “The monomers of PZI were VIPS and PEGDA in the weight ratio of 1: 2.” Polymerization conditions inherited from PZI-F: “polymerized in situ at 55 °C for 6 h… 0.2 wt% AIBN as initiator… The content of monomers in the electrolyte was 40%… EC:DMC (3:7 by volume) with 5 wt% FEC additive.” VIPS monomer preparation/post-steps: “stirred at 0 °C for 72 h. The resulting product was washed with ethanol and filtered three times… transferred to a vacuum oven at 40 °C for 24 h.”

parse.why: Text states: "Preparation of PZI, PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6: The same synthetic method was used to prepare PZI, PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6... PZI-LiTFSI, PZI-LiPF6 contained only one corresponding lithium salt, respectively." The referenced method (for PZI-F) specifies: "in-situ polymerization of VIPS, HFMA and PEGDA (1:2:2 by weight) monomers in the electrolyte of 1 M LiTFSI and 1 M LiTPF6 in EC:DMC (3:7 by volume) with 5 wt% FEC additive, 0.2 wt% AIBN as initiator... polymerized in situ at 55°C for 6 h... monomers in the electrolyte was 40%." For samples without HFMA, the monomers are clarified: "The monomers of PZI were VIPS and PEGDA in the weight ratio of 1: 2." Thus, for PZI-LiPF6 the same in-situ polymerization method applies, with VIPS:PEGDA = 1:2 (w/w), single salt LiPF6, EC:DMC (3:7 v/v), 5 wt% FEC, and AIBN 0.2 wt%.

material_id: TetraPEG gel electrolyte containing 1.0M LiPF6 in EC+DEC+TFEP (53:27:20 by volume

parse.material_id: TetraPEG gel electrolyte containing 1.0M LiPF6 in EC+DEC+TFEP (53:27:20 by volume

synthesis.gel_composition: 1.0 M LiPF6 in EC+DEC+TFEP = 53:27:20 by volume

parse.why: Fabrication described as: prepare a TetraPEG hydrogel by mixing amine- and N-hydroxysuccinimide-terminated TetraPEG (Mw = 20 kDa), 5 wt.% hydrogel, then dry completely and re-swell in the electrolyte solution. The electrolyte is specified as 1.0 M LiPF6 in EC + DEC + TFEP = 53:27:20 by volume at room temperature. Equilibrium swelling reached in ~8 h. Relevant excerpts: “The nonflammable TetraPEG gel electrolyte was fabricated using a simple two-step process… The TetraPEG hydrogel was prepared by simply mixing two aqueous solutions of … TetraPEG-NH2, and TetraPEG-NHS (Mw = 20 kDa). The 5 wt.% TetraPEG hydrogel was dried completely. The dried gel was then re-swelled in the electrolyte solution (i.e., 1.0 M LiPF6 in EC + DEC + TFEP = 53:27:20, by volume) at room temperature…”; “The Q value increased with the duration of the experiment (8 h). At this point, the gel was in an equilibrium swelling state.”

synthesis.gel_composition: For FPEEK-0.25 (X=0.25 mmol, Y=2.75 mmol; X+Y=3 mmol): hexafluorobisphenol A 0.25 mmol (0.0841 g); 4,4'-(9H-fluorene-9,9-diyl)diphenol 2.75 mmol (0.9636 g); bis(4-fluorophenyl) methanone 3 mmol (0.6546 g); K2CO3 6 mmol (0.828 g); DMAc 10 mL; toluene 10 mL; N2 atmosphere. Heated 142°C for 4 h (azeotropic removal), then 175°C for 5 h (polymerization).

parse.why: Section 2.2 specifies for FPEEK series that X (hexafluorobisphenol A) = 0.25 mmol for FPEEK-0.25 and Y (4,4'-(9H-fluorene-9,9-diyl)diphenol) = 2.75 mmol, with fixed bis(4-fluorophenyl) methanone 3 mmol and K2CO3 6 mmol; solvents DMAc (10 mL) and toluene (10 mL); N2 atmosphere; heated at 142°C 4 h then 175°C 5 h. Workup: poured into 100 mL water + 100 mL methanol to precipitate, submerged in 1 M HCl for 24 h, then vacuum filtered and washed with deionized water three times, dried under vacuum at 120°C for 24 h. Section 2.3 states electrospun mats were dried at 60°C for 24 h. Only synthesis-related and allowed post-treatment tokens were recorded.

synthesis.gel_composition: 3 mmol (0.6546 g) bis(4-fluorophenyl) methane; 3 mmol (1.0512 g) 4,4'-(9H-fluorene-9,9-diyl) diphenol; 6 mmol (0.828 g) K2CO3; 10 mL DMAc; 10 mL toluene

parse.why: 合成（2.2）：PEEK采用与FPEEK相同流程，仅更换配比为：3 mmol (0.6546 g) bis(4-fluorophenyl) methane，3 mmol (1.0512 g) 4,4'-(9H-fluorene-9,9-diyl) diphenol，6 mmol (0.828 g) K2CO3，10 mL DMAc（分散剂），10 mL toluene（共沸剂）。同流程条件：室温搅拌成均一溶液后，142°C（油浴）4 h共沸除水；升至175°C 5 h完成聚合；将粘稠聚合物倒入100 mL蒸馏水+100 mL甲醇中析出；于1 mol L−1 HCl中浸泡24 h；抽滤并用去离子水洗涤3次；真空干燥120°C 24 h（FPEEK段明确，PEEK声明“相同合成过程”）。分离膜制备（2.3）：PEEK在无水NMP中配成8 wt%溶液电纺（0.5 mL/h；18 kV；喷头-集电鼓距离15 cm；集电鼓220 rpm；厚度约30 μm），电纺后的毡在60°C真空干燥24 h去除残余溶剂。上述据此填入配方（gel_composition）与后处理步骤（过滤、甲醇/蒸馏水/去离子水清洗、120°C干燥、60°C干燥）。

parse.why:
与 monolithium salt 1 直接相关的合成与后处理信息：
- 过滤：制备单锂盐通用路线（适用于1–3）中两次过滤去除副产与过量试剂：“…filtered (Whatman PVDF filter 0.2 μm) to remove both LiF formed in the reaction and excess LiOH.”；耦合反应后再次“filtered… to remove the sodium hydroxide formed in the reaction.”（2.2节）。按规则“all/each sample …”视为适用于样品1。
- 干燥：所有新盐在使用前统一干燥条件：“…LiTf and all of the new salts were dried only at 100 °C for 24 h under the same dynamic vacuum.”（2.1节）。
其它字段（如晶化、配方、模板、硅/铝源）不适用于该有机锂盐体系，文中无对应可提取信息，故置为 null。

parse.why: For dilithium salts (4–6), “All the steps and the procedures were identical to those described previously for the monolithium salts.” The monolithium procedure includes filtration: “it was filtered (Whatman PVDF filter 0.2 μm) to remove…,” and again after coupling “it was filtered… to remove the sodium hydroxide.” Before use, “LiTf and all of the new salts were dried only at 100 °C for 24 h under the same dynamic vacuum.” Additionally, “The dilithium salts were placed in the dry box and further used without any purification.”

parse.why: Aquivion E87-05S membranes (Aquivion-87) were: (1) "soaked in 0.1 M LiOH solution for 48 h under constant stirring to obtain membranes in Li+ form"; (2) "washed several times with deionized water"; (3) "dried at 70 °C under vacuum for 12 h". Polymer electrolytes were then formed by placing the dry Li+ membranes in equal-volume EC–PC or EC–DMA solutions and soaking for 1 day over 3 Å molecular sieves in a glovebox. No crystallization or gel-composition/species (zeolite-related) applies.

parse.why: The paper states: "the fluorinated and cyanided polymer solid-state electrolyte (F&C-PE) is designed and synthesized by in-situ polymerization..." and "The homogeneous and transparent precursor solution, which consists of MCA, EEA and FEC, is transformed into a solid state matter after free radical-initiated polymerization." It further specifies: "When the molar ratio of −C≡N groups to C-O-C groups is 1:5 (with the molar ratio of MCA to EEA being 1:2)... this ratio is selected for the preparation of C-PE." These are the only explicit synthesis details provided for F&C-PE in the excerpt; no temperatures/times or post-treatments are given.

synthesis.gel_composition: Equimolar 6FDA and 1,4-diamino-2-fluorobenzene (FPDA) in NMP, brought to ~15 wt% solids; stirred at room temperature overnight under dry argon.

parse.why: Specific section states FPDA polymerization with 6FDA was done by mixing equimolar amounts in NMP and stirring at room temperature overnight. The general two-step process for polymers with fluorinated diamines specifies solutions at ~15 wt% in NMP with additions under dry argon. Film formation and curing steps include filtering the solution through a 5 µm filter, drying at 60 °C (8 h to overnight), then heating under nitrogen to 350 °C (1 h) at 1 °C/min, followed by removal of the cured film by immersion in 5% aqueous HF, thorough rinsing with distilled water, and drying.

synthesis.gel_composition: equimolar 6FDA (dianhydride) : TFPDA (1,4-diaminotetrafluorobenzene); 15 wt% in NMP

parse.why: General procedure: equimolar quantities of dianhydride and diamine were added to NMP and brought to 15% by weight with additional NMP; additions under dry argon (Experimental, Synthetic Procedure). For 6FDA-TFPDA specifically, equimolar amounts were reacted and strong final films resulted only if solution polymerization was carried out at temperatures in excess of 130 °C for 5 h; solutions were of extremely low viscosity (6FDA-TFPDA section). Film casting/drying/cure applied to these low-viscosity solutions: solution filtered through a 5-μm filter onto a quartz disk, vacuumed 1 h, dried at 60 °C for between 8 h and overnight, then heated under nitrogen at 1 °C/min to 350 °C, held 1 h, and cooled (Experimental, Synthetic Procedure). The cured film was removed by immersion in dilute (5%) aqueous HF, thoroughly rinsed in distilled water, and dried (Experimental, Synthetic Procedure).

synthesis.gel_composition: Equimolar 6FDA:dianhydride + 1,4-diamino-2-(trifluoromethyl)benzene (TFMPDA) in NMP at 15 wt% solids; solution polycondensation at room temperature under dry argon

parse.why: General procedure for polymers with fluorinated diamines: equimolar dianhydride and diamine in NMP, brought to 15% by weight, under dry argon (Experimental: “The polymers utilizing fluorinated diamines were generally obtained via a two-step process… equimolar quantities of dianhydride and diamine were added to NMP… 15% by weight… under dry argon.”). synthesis.gel_composition: Equimolar 6FDA + 2TFMPDA in NMP, brought to 15 wt% solids (under dry argon)

parse.why: For fluorinated diamines, equimolar monomers were added to NMP and brought to 15 wt% under dry argon (general procedure). Specifically for 6FDA-2TFMPDA: polymerization yielded low-viscosity solution; a cyclic chain-extension process was required: cure to 250 °C, redissolve in NMP, redry, recure to 250 °C, and a third cycle produced an intact film; an explored sequence used cures at 250 °C, 250 °C, and 300 °C (Table 3). Drying at 100 °C is reported for the poly(amic acid) precursor in the 2TFMPDA sequence (Table 3). Films were formed by filtering the solution through a 5 μm filter onto quartz, and cured films were removed by immersion in dilute (5%) aqueous HF, rinsed with distilled water.

  "why": "For fluorinated diamines, equimolar monomers were added to NMP and brought to 15 wt% under dry argon (general procedure). Specifically for 6FDA-2TFMPDA: polymerization yielded low-viscosity solution; a cyclic chain-extension process was required: cure to 250 °C, redissolve in NMP, redry, recure to 250 °C, and a third cycle produced an intact film; an explored sequence used cures at 250 °C, 250 °C, and 300 °C (Table 3). Drying at 100 °C is reported for the poly(amic acid) precursor in the 2TFMPDA sequence (Table 3). Films were formed by filtering the solution through a 5 μm filter onto quartz, and cured films were removed by immersion in dilute (5%) aqueous HF, rinsed with distilled water."

parse.why: For 6FDA-2DAT: "2,5-Diamino-4-methyltoluene (2DAT) ... purified by two successive airless recrystallizations followed by two successive vacuum sublimations... Polymerization of 2DAT with 6FDA was straightforward ... Equimolar amounts of the monomers were added to NMP and allowed to stir overnight at room temperature in an argon atmosphere. A viscous, light yellow solution was formed." Film processing used the general procedure: solution was filtered through a 5 μm Millipore filter, cast on a quartz disk, dried at 60 °C (8 h to overnight) under slight N2 purge, then heated under nitrogen at 1 °C/min to 350 °C, held 1 h, and cooled. The cured film was removed by immersion in dilute (5%) aqueous HF, then thoroughly rinsed in distilled water and dried.

parse.why: Section 2.1: LiTFSI and PEGMEA monomer with dibenzoyl peroxide initiator were mixed (EO:Li = 18:1; initiator 0.2% of PEGMEA). LCE was 1 M LiPF6 in EC/DMC/EMC (1/1/1, v/v/v). parse.why: GPE membranes were made by dissolving PVDF-HFP/PMMA/TPU (37:50:13 wt%) in DMF/EG (90:10 wt%), then adding 2–8 wt% Na3Zr2Si2PO12; GPE-4 corresponds to 4 wt% filler. The cast films were dried at 80 °C for 24 h in vacuum and then soaked in 1 M NaClO4 in EC/DMC (1:1) for 12 h. Prior to use, PVDF-HFP, TPU, and PMMA were dried at 100 °C for 24 h under vacuum. - 其余如活化吸液（"activated by absorbing ... for over 12 h"）不在允许的 post_treatment token 范畴，未填入。

synthesis.gel_composition: Resorcinol 2 mmol + formaldehyde (37 wt%) 4 mmol + 1,6-diaminohexane (DAH) 0.5 mmol + Ludox AS-40 silica (40 wt% colloid); for C-1: SiO2:resorcinol = 2:1; solvent: water.

parse.why: C-1 是以胶体二氧化硅为硬模板的氮掺杂多孔碳。配方与条件：2 mmol resorcinol 溶于水，加入 4 mmol 37 wt% formaldehyde，加入一定量 Ludox AS-40，再加 0.5 mmol DAH；加热至 80°C 搅拌 42 h 后沉淀，过滤并用水和乙醇洗涤。所得 Si/聚合物在 N2 下 800°C 保温 2 h（文中称 pyrolyzed），随后用 2.5 M NaOH 溶液去除二氧化硅，再过滤并以水、乙醇洗涤。样品命名对应 SiO2:resorcinol 比从 2:1、3.5:1 到 5:1，分别得到 C-1、C-2、C-3；因此 C-1 为 SiO2:resorcinol=2:1。上述文本未给出搅拌转速、干燥步骤等，未作填写。

The typical preparation uses 2 mmol resorcinol, 4 mmol formaldehyde (37 wt%), then add Ludox AS-40 and 0.5 mmol DAH; heated at 80 °C for 42 h, then "precipitated compounds were obtained by filtration and then purified with water and ethanol." The Si/polymer was "pyrolyzed at 800 °C for 2 h under nitrogen" and the product was "treated with aqueous NaOH solution (2.5 M) to remove the silica and further recovered by filtration, washed with water and ethanol." These steps apply to all C-x and thus to C-3.

parse.why: Relevant excerpts: (1) Emulsion-assisted porous silica: "TEOS 0.65 g was mixed with PS beads (0.2 g) within aqueous solution of ... P104 ... 3 wt% of emulsion stabilizer (ABIL EM90) was dissolved in hexadecane. ... mixed ... with the volumetric ratio of 1:3 followed by homogenization. Then, the solvent in the aqueous phase was evaporated at 90°C for 50 min and 100°C for 10 min. ... residues were thoroughly washed with hexane ... The collected particles were calcined at 500°C to remove any organic species." (2) Carbon coating with boric acid: "The porous silica particles were mixed with an aqueous solution of sucrose (1 wt%) and boric acid (0.15 wt%). Subsequently, sulfuric acid was added for dehydration and the mixtures were dried at 160°C for 6 h. Finally, carbon-coated porous silica were synthesized by carbonization at 900°C under Ar atmosphere." Note: HF etching is stated as "Sometimes ... if required" and HF-etched samples are discussed separately; thus not included for SiO₂@C + B.

It also defines the copolymer matrix: "The copolymerization of Fn-EO and EOEC monomers has been also successfully proceeded. The resulting copolymers are denoted as Fn-EOEC_{x-y}." No temperatures, times, or post-treatments relevant to a crystallization/zeolite context are provided for PISE preparation.

synthesis.gel_composition: Bisphenol S (10.01 g, 40.0 mmol, 1.00 eq.); decafluorobiphenyl (13.765 g, 41.2 mmol, 1.03 eq.); potassium carbonate (13.82 g, 100.0 mmol, 2.50 eq.); DMAc (120 mL)

parse.why: LAE2 synthesis: "Bisphenol S (10.01 g, 40.0 mmol, 1.00 eq.), decafluorobiphenyl (13.765 g, 41.2 mmol, 1.03 eq.), potassium carbonate (13.82 g, 100.0 mmol, 2.50 eq.), and DMAc (120 mL) were added and stirred under nitrogen at room temperature for 10 min. The mixture was heated to 120°C for 6 hr, then cooled to room temperature, precipitated into 0.5 M HCl, and collected via filtration. The material was taken up in chloroform, dried over MgSO4, filtered, and reprecipitated into hexane ... The material was dried in a vacuum oven at 80°C overnight."

synthesis.gel_composition: HBFP (0.50 g, 1.04 mmol para-F, 1.0 eq.); K2CO3 (0.216 g, 1.56 mmol, 1.5 eq.); 18-crown-6 (0.385 g, 1.46 mmol, 1.40 eq.); potassium 4-hydroxyphenyl sulfonate (0.243 g, 1.15 mmol, 1.10 eq.); DMAc (5.21 mL, 0.2 M); stirred 3 days at room temperature

parse.why: Procedure for a 100% sulfonated HBFP: HBFP (0.50 g, 1.04 mmol para-F, 1.0 eq.), K2CO3 (0.216 g, 1.56 mmol, 1.5 eq.), 18-crown-6 (0.385 g, 1.46 mmol, 1.40 eq.), potassium 4-hydroxyphenyl sulfonate (0.243 g, 1.15 mmol, 1.10 eq.), and DMAc (5.21 mL, 0.2 M) were added, and the mixture was stirred for 3 days at room temperature. The polymer was precipitated into 1 M HCl to yield a white solid. The polymer was isolated by filtration. Once dry, the polymer was washed with hot 1 M KCl to remove 18-crown-6. Polymers with three different sulfonate contents were prepared (50, 85, and 100%), designated as FPSA50, FPSA85, and FPSA100.

For SPE preparation, all PCs (PC-1–3) were mixed with 30 wt% LiTFSI in acetone; after 1 h mixing, solvent was evaporated at rt followed by a thermal treatment of 24 h at 60 °C.

synthesis.gel_composition: 64 g 2-fluoroethanol : 85 g dibromomethane : 43 g NaOH : 200 mL tetraglyme

parse.why: Electrolyte synthesis section: "To a 500 mL round flask was added 64 g of 2-fluoroethanol, 85 g of dibromomethane, 43 g of NaOH and 200 mL tetraglyme. The suspension was stirred at room temperature for 2 h under air and then heated to 40 °C to stir overnight... further heated to 70 °C to stir overnight. The suspension was directly distilled under vacuum (vapor temperature ~70–75 °C at ~1 kPa) to obtain colorless liquid as the product. The crude product was distilled under vacuum for four times to ensure purity."

parse.why: Raw precursors and solution prep: “LiNO3, La(NO3)3·6H2O, Zr(OCH2CH2CH3)4, and NH4F were dissolved in 10 mL of N,N-dimethylformamide (DMF) with acetic acid in a vol ratio of 8:2. After sufficient dissolution, 10 wt% (total weight of DMF and acetic acid) polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP) was dissolved in DMF and continued stirring until a transparent and viscous solution was formed.” Electrospinning used to make fibers (equipment parameters given). Calcination: “The fluorine-doped Li7La3Zr2O12 fibers (LLZO-Fx, x = 0–0.3) were calcined at different temperatures of 700 and 750 °C for 2 h… Therefore, LLZO-Fx fibers calcined at 700 °C for 2 h were used to prepare the CSE.” This applies to LLZO-F0.2; atmosphere not specified -> unknown.

synthesis.gel_composition: Pyridine (8.4 ml), NMP (30 ml), CaCl2 (2.16 g, 19.4 mmol), TPP (8.42 ml, 32.12 mmol), 4,4'-(hexafluoroisopropylidene)dianiline (2.51 g, 6.02 mmol), potassium(4-carboxyl benzene sulphonyl)imide (3.12 g, 6.02 mmol); argon atmosphere; heated to 110 °C for 7 h; precipitated into 1000 ml methanol (ice bath).

parse.why: 与(3)直接相关的合成条件见 2.2.2："8.4 ml of pyridine, 30 ml of NMP, 2.16 g of calcium chloride (19.4 mmol) 8.42 ml TPP (32.12 mmol) 2.51 g (6.02 mmol) 4,4′ (hexafluoroisopropylidene)dianiline, and 3.12 g (6.02 mmol) potassium(4-carboxyl benzene sulphonyl)imide, were added subsequently to a 100 ml round-bottom flask under an argon atmosphere. The solution was heated to 110 °C and the reaction continued under stirring for 7 h. Subsequently, the reaction mixture was cooled to room temperature (approximately 25 °C) and precipitated by dropwise addition into 1000 ml of methanol in an ice bath. The yield of the final substance (3) was 95% (5.09 g)."

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF-HFP + ETPTA (cross-linker) + LLZTO + LiClO4 (in DMF); HMPP photoinitiator

parse.why: Preparation details explicitly for PEL: “2 g of PVDF-HFP, which had been dried for 24 h at 60 °C … mixed with an appropriate amount of LiClO4 and dissolved in DMF … temperature was maintained at 60 °C while LLZTO was added and stirred … Next, the cross-linking agent ETPTA and the photoinitiator HMPP were added … subjected to UV light at an intensity of 1200 mW cm−2 for 1 min … then placed in a vacuum-drying oven for 6 h to obtain the PEL composite solid electrolyte.” Composition variants were studied; optimal conditions reported include PVDF-HFP:ETPTA = 2:1 and LLZTO content explored at 0–20 wt.% (10 wt.% giving the highest conductivity), but the exact fixed loading for a generic “PEL” is not uniquely specified, so ratios are not enforced in structured fields.

synthesis.gel_composition: HCE: LiFSI in DME; monomer: TFMA (fluorinated); cross-linker: EGDA; radical initiator: AIBN. Variants with TF content 23%, 18%, 13%, 8% relative to HCE were studied; 13% TF showed the highest ionic conductivity.

parse.why:
与 TF+HCE 直接相关的制备信息出处：
- 电解液体系与组分："...in situ polymerization, which allows us to modulate the solvation structure of highly concentrated liquid electrolyte (HCE) based on lithium bis(fluorosulfonyl)imide (LiFSI) in 1,2-dimethoxyethane (DME)."；
- 单体/交联剂："We employed acrylate-based monomers: TFMA and EMA to form the fluorinated (TF) and non-fluorinated (EE) polymer backbones, respectively, with ethylene methacrylate (EGDA) as the cross-linker."（本材料为 TF+HCE，对应 TFMA 与 EGDA）；
- 引发剂与聚合条件："Thermal polymerization of the precursor solutions was initiated using azobisisobutyronitrile (AIBN) as a radical initiator at 60 °C for 24 h, resulting in complete solidification of the precursor."（温度 60 °C，时间 24 h = 1 day）；
- 配比范围信息："At 30 °C, We investigated electrolytes with varying TF contents (23%, 18%, 13%, and 8% TF relative to HCE). The optimal ionic conductivity was observed at 13% TF content."（列出作为配方信息，未对 TF+HCE 指定唯一含量，故不做唯一化）。

PPMBB is described as a gel-polymer electrolyte membrane obtained by blending LiP(VDF-co-MAF)BB with P(VDF-co-HFP) and then immersing to form a gel: “a boron-centered single-ion-conductive gel-polymer electrolyte was successfully prepared by blending LiP(VDF-co-MAF)BB with P(VDF-co-HFP)” and “The electrolyte membrane… after immersion… shifts from a solid to a gel-like state” (Figure S5). LiP(VDF-co-MAF)BB itself was “prepared using a one-step method,” and “The specific preparation process and ratio are shown in Table S1,” which is not provided in the text. No explicit casting ratios, temperatures, or times for PPMBB synthesis are given in the main text; thus detailed parameters are left null.

parse.why: PSPEM-3 corresponds to PVDF-HFP:SN weight ratio 7:3: “The weight ratios of PVDF-HFP to SN were investigated as 9:1, 8:2, and 7:3, which were named as PSPEM-1, PSPEM-2, and PSPEM-3, respectively.” Synthesis: PVDF-HFP dissolved in DMF at 50 °C 1 h, add SN and stir 4 h at 50 °C, cast, then “quickly immersed in deionized water for 24 h. It was dried in a vacuum oven at 50 °C for 12 h to obtain the polymer electrolyte membranes (PEMs...).” The washing and drying steps are recorded as washed_deionized-water and dried_50c_12h.

synthesis.gel_composition: PVDF-HFP:SN=9:1

parse.why: From Section 2.1: PVDF-HFP dissolved in DMF and stirred at 50 °C for 1 h, then a proportion of SN added and stirred for another 4 h at 50 °C. Solution cast and quickly immersed in deionized water for 24 h, then dried in a vacuum oven at 50 °C for 12 h to obtain PEMs (80–90 μm). Weight ratios PVDF-HFP:SN of 9:1, 8:2, 7:3 named PSPEM-1, -2, -3; pure PVDF-HFP named PPEM. GPEs obtained by soaking PEMs in electrolytes for 1 h; resulting products named PSGPE-1, -2, -3, and PGPE. Therefore, PSGPE-1 corresponds to PVDF-HFP:SN=9:1 with immersion in water and vacuum drying as post steps.

parse.why: PSGPE-2 is defined as the GPE derived from PSPEM-2, where the PVDF-HFP:SN weight ratio is 8:2. Synthesis steps: PVDF-HFP dissolved in DMF and stirred at 50 °C for 1 h, then SN added and stirred 4 h at 50 °C; the solution was cast and quickly immersed in deionized water for 24 h, then dried in a vacuum oven at 50 °C for 12 h to obtain the membrane; the GPE (PSGPE-2) was finally obtained by soaking the membrane in electrolyte for 1 h. Only washing (deionized water) and drying (50 °C, 12 h) map to the allowed post-treatment tokens. The electrolyte composition is not specified in the provided text, so it is not included.

synthesis.gel_composition: TFMA:TEP = 35:65 (vol%); LiTFSI = 0.5 M; LiDFOB = 0.5 M; AIBN (initiator) = 1 wt%

parse.why: 样品命名与组分：文中“samples were denoted as 'xTFMA-yLF-0.5LB'… Subsequently, the 35TFMA-0.5LF-0.5LB sample was abbreviated SGPE.”；体积分数与盐浓度：TEP 与 TFMA 体积比含有 35:65 情况（对应 35 vol% TFMA），并加入 LiTFSI 0.5 M、LiDFOB 0.5 M（“TEP was mixed with TFMA… (35:65…); then, LiTFSI… (0.2, 0.5, 1…) and a constant concentration of 0.5 M [LiDFOB]”）；引发剂：AIBN 1 wt%（“After that, 1 wt%… AIBN… was added to the precursor”）；聚合条件：60 °C, 12 h（“heated at 60 °C for 12 h for complete polymerization”）。

synthesis.gel_composition: 35HEMA-0.5LF-0.5LB (35 vol% HEMA + 65 vol% TEP; 0.5 M LiTFSI; 0.5 M LiDFOB; 1 wt% AIBN)

parse.why: Text states: “The comparative sample CGPE was prepared by replacing TFMA with an equal volume of HEMA in SGPE, and then, a homogeneous gel was also obtained under the same reacting condition.” SGPE is explicitly 35TFMA-0.5LF-0.5LB (35 vol% TFMA; 0.5 M LiTFSI; 0.5 M LiDFOB; 1 wt% AIBN) and polymerized at 60 °C for 12 h after injecting the precursor (50 μL) (Sections 2.2.1 and 3.1). It further states: “the ionic conductivity of 35HEMA-0.5LF-0.5LB GPE electrolyte … is denoted as CGPE.” All procedures were in an argon-filled glove box (<0.01 ppm H2O/O2).

synthesis.gel_composition: VBImTFSI:MMA = 4:1 (molar); LiTFSI = 30 wt% of (VBImTFSI + MMA); SiO2@IL = 5 wt% (SiO2@IL prepared from PYR13TFSI:SiO2 = 23:1 molar); photoinitiator = 2 wt% of monomers; DEC solvent = 0.5 mL; deposit on glass fiber (16 mm) and UV cure 25 min; then add 5 μL PYR13TFSI on surface.

parse.why: Section 2.3 Step 3: F-free QSCE prepared by replacing HFM with MMA while keeping the same ratio and procedure as F-QSCE@30. Composition basis from optimization: VBImTFSI/HFM = 4:1 molar (fixed in optimization), LiTFSI = 30 wt% of monomers, SiO2@IL = 5 wt% (Fig. 1a text notes SiO2@IL from PYR13TFSI:SiO2 = 23:1 molar). Photoinitiator used at 2 wt% of monomers (Step 1) and same procedure applied. Mixture made with 0.5 mL DEC, deposited on 16 mm glass fiber and UV-cured 25 min (Step 1/3), then 5 μL PYR13TFSI added on surface and dried at 80 °C for 12 h under vacuum (Step 3).

parse.why: 制备方法（2.2）：“a mixture of SiO2 and PYR13 TFSI … with 5 mL methanol. The mixture was stirred for 12 h … methanol was evaporated using a rotary evaporator. synthesis.gel_composition: β-cyclodextrin (2 g, 1.762 mmol) dissolved in anhydrous N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone (17 mL) under Ar; 2-bromoisobutyryl bromide (13.72 mL, 111.006 mmol) in anhydrous NMP (13 mL) added dropwise at 0°C (1 h), held 0°C (2 h), then 25°C (2 days, water bath)

parse.why: The paper states that the macroinitiator heptakis [2,3,6-tri-O-(2-bromo-2-methylpropionyl)-β-cyclodextrin (21-β-CD-Br)] was synthesized by reacting β-CD with 2-bromoisobutyryl bromide in anhydrous NMP under argon: BIBB solution in NMP was added dropwise to β-CD in NMP at 0°C over 1 h, kept at 0°C for 2 h, then at 25°C for 2 days. Workup: concentrate, dilute with CH2Cl2, wash with saturated NaHCO3 (3×100 mL) and deionized water (3×100 mL), dry over Na2SO4 overnight, filter, evaporate, crystallize in cold n-hexane, filter, and vacuum-dry at 40°C for 24 h. These steps are directly tied to 21-β-CD-Br (Fig. 1a and Methods: Synthetic procedures of 21-β CD-g-PTFEMA).

  "why": "The paper states that the macroinitiator heptakis [2,3,6-tri-O-(2-bromo-2-methylpropionyl)-\u03b2-cyclodextrin (21-\u03b2-CD-Br)] was synthesized by reacting \u03b2-CD with 2-bromoisobutyryl bromide in anhydrous NMP under argon: BIBB solution in NMP was added dropwise to \u03b2-CD in NMP at 0\u00b0C over 1 h, kept at 0\u00b0C for 2 h, then at 25\u00b0C for 2 days. Workup: concentrate, dilute with CH2Cl2, wash with saturated NaHCO3 (3\u00d7100 mL) and deionized water (3\u00d7100 mL), dry over Na2SO4 overnight, filter, evaporate, crystallize in cold n-hexane, filter, and vacuum-dry at 40\u00b0C for 24 h. These steps are directly tied to 21-\u03b2-CD-Br (Fig. 1a and Methods: Synthetic procedures of 21-\u03b2 CD-g-PTFEMA)."

parse.why: The final polymer 21-β-CD-g-PTFEMA was synthesized via ATRP: TFEMA (8.5 mL, 0.059 mol), bpy (69.7 mg), cyclohexanone (8.5 mL) were deoxygenated; CuCl (14.7 mg) added; reaction at 80 °C; 21-Br-βCD macroinitiator injected; after 12 h the mixture was cooled, diluted with CH2Cl2, filtered through neutral alumina to remove copper complex, then purified by dissolution/precipitation twice with CH2Cl2 and cold n-hexane, and dried at 40 °C under vacuum for 2 days. (Methods: 'Synthetic procedures of 21-β CD-g-PTFEMA... After 12 h... filtered through a column... purified... dried at 40 °C in vacuum for 2 days.')

parse.why: Methods: “P(IL-OFHDODA-VEC) was prepared by UV light curing… the mixed IL, OFHDODA, VEC monomer, and LiTFSI were stirred for 40 min at 25°C. After IRGACURE 819 (0.6% molar weight of the monomers) was added and stirred for 20 min, this mixture was blade-cast … followed by… 30 W of 365-nm UV light… in an argon-filled glove box.” Composition: “a molar ratio of [LiTFSI] to [the monomers] was set as 1:2.” Optimization: conductivity increased when “[IL]:[OFHDODA]:[VEC]” was tuned “from 8.5:2:1 to 8.5:2:3,” with the optimized monomer ratio used for subsequent cell tests.

parse.why: Preparation details apply to all LPIFDs and thus to PEO-LPIFD. Polymers (including PEO and PVDF-HFP) were pre-dried at 90 °C under vacuum for 24 h. Due to limited solubility, PEO was dissolved in acetonitrile at 3 wt% while PVDF-HFP was dissolved in DME at 5 wt% (stirring at 55 °C). The Li-polymer solution (PEO) was mixed with PVDF-HFP solution at a 1:2.5 weight ratio, then LiFSI was added to reach 63 wt% in LPIFD. The LPIFD solution was solution-cast, dried at room temperature, then vacuum oven dried at 70 °C overnight and 75 °C for 2–3 h.

parse.why: The LPIFDs were made by solution cast. LiFSI (63 wt% in LPIFD) was added into the polymer blend solution (PMMA mixed with PVDF-HFP at a weight ratio of 1:2.5) (Methods). All polymers (including PMMA and PVDF-HFP) were dissolved separately in DME at 5 wt% (PVDF-HFP with stirring at 55 °C) (Methods). The LPIFD solutions were poured into Teflon dishes and dried at room temperature, then further dried in a vacuum oven at 70 °C overnight and 75 °C for 2–3 h (Methods). PMMA-LPIFD was prepared with the same composition ratio as PTFEP-LPIFD (main text), where the Li-polymer/F-diluter ratio is 0.4 (i.e., 1:2.5) and LiFSI is 63 wt%.

parse.why: PTFEP-LPIFD is defined as the PTFEP/PVDF-HFP polymer blend (miscible) with LiFSI salt. Methods: Li-polymers (including PTFEP) and PVDF-HFP were dissolved separately in DME (5 wt%); the Li-polymer solution was mixed with PVDF-HFP at 1:2.5 (w/w) to form the blend. Then LiFSI was added until salt content reached 63 wt% to obtain the LPIFD solution. The solution was cast in Teflon dishes in an Ar glovebox and dried: room temperature solvent evaporation, then vacuum oven at 70°C overnight and 75°C for 2–3 h (used here as dried_70c and dried_75c_2-3h). The text explicitly names this electrolyte "PTFEP-LPIFD" after 63 wt% LiFSI addition.

parse.why: Methods: All polymers (including PMMA and PVDF-HFP) were dried at 90 °C under vacuum for 24 h. Each polymer was dissolved separately in DME at 5 wt% (PVDF-HFP required stirring at 55 °C). The Li-polymer solution (PMMA) was mixed with PVDF-HFP solution at a weight ratio of 1:2.5. LiFSI was added to reach 63 wt% in LPIFD. For PMMA-LPIFD and PEO-LPIFD, the same composition ratio as PTFEP-LPIFD was used (main text, Design section).

The paper reports polymer samples (e.g., P1a–P1f) and provides a general copolymerization workup: “The copolymers were isolated by three sessions of precipitation from methanol and dried under vacuum at 60 °C for 24 h.” No zeolite synthesis (gel, template, silica/aluminium sources, crystallization) is described. parse.why: 文中说明 PFPE1000-diol 为商购样：“Hydroxy-terminated PFPEs (PFPE-diols) with nominal molecular weights of 1,000, 1,400, 2,000, and 4,000 g/mol were purchased from Solvay.”；此外，所有材料在后续使用前均进行干燥处理：“All materials were dried in argon glove boxes with oxygen and water at sub-ppm levels for 24 h.” 因此仅能提取与 PFPE1000-diol 直接相关的后处理为在氩气手套箱中干燥24小时；无其他合成配方或结晶条件信息。

parse.why: PFPE-diols (including 1,400 g/mol) were purchased, not synthesized: "Hydroxy-terminated PFPEs (PFPE-diols) with nominal molecular weights of 1,000, 1,400, 2,000, and 4,000 g/mol were purchased from Solvay." General electrolyte prep applied to all materials: "All materials were dried in argon glove boxes ... for 24 h. Afterward, LiTFSI was added directly to PFPE samples and stirred at room temperature overnight." Detailed synthetic steps (filtering, washing, etc.) are for PFPE-DMC and not applicable to PFPE1400-diol.

PFPE2000-diol (a hydroxy-terminated PFPE, nominal MW 2000 g/mol) was purchased from Solvay; no synthesis conditions were provided. A general note states all materials were dried in an argon glovebox for 24 h, but no temperature was specified and no other processing specific to PFPE2000-diol was described.

PFPE4000-diol (hydroxy-terminated PFPE, nominal MW 4000 g/mol) was purchased from Solvay. No in-house synthesis, gel composition, template, or crystallization conditions are provided. A general step states that all materials were dried in an argon glovebox for 24 h, but no temperature is given, so a compliant drying token cannot be constructed.

parse.why: Methods: Fluorolink D10 and triethylamine in 1,1,1,3,3-pentafluorobutane at 0 °C under N2; methyl chloroformate solution added dropwise; heated to 25 °C and stirred 12 h; workup: filtered under vacuum, washed with water (×3) and brine (×2), dried over MgSO4, filtered, solvent removed under reduced pressure, yielding PFPE1000-DMC. Schema supports only tokens for filtering and washing; reaction conditions and drying over MgSO4/evaporation are not expressible in the allowed fields.

parse.why: Methods: Fluorolink D10 and triethylamine were dissolved in 1,1,1,3,3-pentafluorobutane at 0 °C under N2; methyl chloroformate (in the same solvent) was added dropwise; heated to 25 °C and stirred 12 h; filtered under vacuum; washed with water (×3) and brine (×2); organic layers dried over MgSO4, filtered, and evaporated to give PFPE1000-DMC. This procedure was repeated with Fluorolinek D10H to produce PFPE1400-DMC.
